label: Natural Resources & Critical Minerals
description:
Energy resources (fossil fuels, nuclear, renewables), USGS 2022 critical minerals (~50 entries including rare earth elements and platinum group metals), and ecosystem resources (freshwater, forests, oceans, soil, fisheries).

Atom IDs: resource:energy:*, resource:mineral:*, resource:ecosystem:*
attribution: USGS National Minerals Information Center | IEA
